# DW6 Dishwasher Manual

## Filter And Spray Arm Cleaning
For dishwasher cleaning, remove the lower filter, rinse food soil, and rotate the spray arm to clear blocked holes. Refit both parts before starting a cycle.

## F2 Water Leak Recovery
Fault code F2 means leak protection stopped the dishwasher. Turn off water, dry the base tray, inspect the inlet hose, then restart after the leak recovery check.

## Rinse Aid
If dishes remain wet, refill rinse aid and choose the extra dry option.
